title: Gate key as flag on pass and check
description:
Let gate execution and inspection accept the gate as a flag, matching what users reach for, in addition to the positional key.

## Background

`gate pass` and `gate check` accept the gate key only positionally today (cli.rs:973-978, 1017-1022), which is not the form users first try. `gate add` takes a vector of keys and is out of scope for the singular flag.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-03: gate pass and gate check accept the gate via --gate <key> and via the positional key, with identical behaviour.

## Notes

Touch the Check/Pass variants and handlers in cli.rs. The same `Check` variant is later extended with run history, so keep the flag additive alongside the positional key.
